PCC will as abstracted by Macnamera

I bequeath to my Mother Church of Sarum 3 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey於1452年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，他的父親Richard Danvers43歲，母親Elizabeth Euphemia Langston20歲。他和Anne Stradling至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。他於1503年在英國維爾爾被列為high sheriff 。他去世於1514年1月14日在英國英格蘭維爾爾道千享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾道千。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey于1452年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，他的父亲Richard Danvers43岁，母亲Elizabeth Euphemia Langston20岁。他和Anne Stradling至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。他于1503年在英国維爾爾被列为high sheriff 。他去世于1514年1月14日在英国英格兰維爾爾道千享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾道千。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey was born in 1452, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Danvers, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, was 20. He had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Anne Stradling. In 1503, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as high sheriff  in Wiltshire, England. He died on 14 January 1514, in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey est né en 1452, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Danvers, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Anne Stradling. En 1503, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff  à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 14 janvier 1514, à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey 1452 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Danvers 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Euphemia Langston 20. Er hatte mit Anne Stradling mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1503, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff  in Wiltshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Januar 1514 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dauntsey, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey è nato il nel 1452 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Danvers, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Anne Stradling. Nel 1503, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff  nel Wiltshire, England. Morì il 14 gennaio 1514, nel Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfeyが1452年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Danversは43歳，母Elizabeth Euphemia Langstonは20歳であった。彼はAnne Stradlingとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。1503年，51歳の時，イギリスウィルトシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriff と記録されている。彼は1514年1月14日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントセイで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアダウントセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey(이)가 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Danvers(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Euphemia Langston(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Anne Stradling(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1503년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 윌츠히르에서 high sheriff 이었다. 그는 1514년 1월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 도츠이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 도츠이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey nasceu em 1452, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Danvers, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com Anne Stradling. Em 1503, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff  em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1514, em Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey родился в 1452 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Danvers было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, 20. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Anne Stradling. В 1503 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии high sheriff  в местности уилцхир, Англия. Он умер 14 января 1514 г. в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности даунци, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Danvers Sheriff of Northhamptonshire Wiltshire, Lord of Dauntfey nació en 1452, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Danvers, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Anne Stradling. En 1503, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff  en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 14 de enero de 1514, en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Dauntsey, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
